text:
ii. Reassessment at least every 30 days (performed in conjunction with an 
ordered therapy service) 
 • At least once every 30 days, for each therapy discipline for which services 
are provided, a qualified therapist (instead of an assistant) must provide 
the ordered therapy service, functionally reassess the patient, and compare 
the resultant measurement to prior assessment measurements. The 
therapist must document in the clinical record the measurement results 
along with the therapist’s
